creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
Affected port: mail/alpine 2.11, r357968 of mail/alpine/Makefile

System is: FreeBSD enterprise.ximalas.info 9.3-BETA2 FreeBSD 9.3-BETA2 #0 r267346: Wed Jun 11 08:58:23 CEST 2014     root@enterprise.ximalas.info:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ENTERPRISEVT  amd64

Patch for option CONS25 doesn't work with mail/alpine 2.11.
Patches for options MAILDIR and QUOTA are no longer available for download.

Either remove the failing options, or mend the CONS25 patch and make the missing patches available.
